title: Lab: Build an Accessible Community Responder Tribute
summary: Lab: Build an Accessible Community Responder Tribute retrieves prior skills in an original unfamiliar biography page with reflow focus and preference failures scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply css zoom reflow, css visible hidden content, css focus visibility, css user preferences, css touch targets, css accessibility regression in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real unfamiliar biography page with reflow focus and preference failures artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.

starterFiles.html: <!-- Continue the Volunteer Shift Deck accessibility hardening here. -->

options.text: Unfamiliar biography page with reflow focus and preference failures case 1: disable browser zoom with viewport metadata so the desktop layout remains stable.

Unfamiliar biography page with reflow focus and preference failures case 1: test complete workflows at high zoom and narrow effective widths, then remove fixed dimensions, clipping, and nonwrapping assumptions that lose content.
Unfamiliar biography page with reflow focus and preference failures case 1: add one horizontal page scrollbar and consider every workflow reflow-safe.
